A clearer process for better launches

From first audit to ongoing improvement, keep every handoff simple, visible and ready for Bricks.

01

Discover

Audit the source, assets and breakpoints before conversion starts.

02

Map

Convert the hierarchy into readable Bricks elements and source BEM classes.

03

Refine

Preserve responsive CSS, pseudo states and overlays on the owning class.

04

Monitor & Improve

Paste, test, reload and keep improving after the section lands in Bricks.
